revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to related topic |name=To a related topic |to=an article about a similar topic |info=** Redirects from related topics are different than redirects from related words, because a related topic is more likely to warrant a full and detailed description in the target article. If this redirect's subject is [[WP:N|notable]], then also tag it with {{tl|R with possibilities}} and {{tl|R printworthy}}. |main category=Redirects to related topics }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to related topic |name=To a related topic |to=an article about a similar topic |info=** Redirects from related topics are different than redirects from related words, because a related topic is more likely to warrant a full and detailed description in the target article. If this redirect's subject is [[WP:N|notable]], then also tag it with {{tl|R with possibilities}} and {{tl|R printworthy}}. |main category=Redirects to related topics }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to related topic |name=To a related topic |to=an article about a similar topic |info=** Redirects from related topics are different than redirects from related words, because a related topic is more likely to warrant a full and detailed description in the target article. If this redirect's subject is [[WP:N|notable]], then also tag it with {{tl|R with possibilities}} and {{tl|R printworthy}}. |main category=Redirects to related topics }}<noinclude> <!-- Place categories on /doc subpage; interwikis go to Wikidata. --> {{Documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23530060143|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to related topic |name=To a related topic |to=an article about a similar topic |info=** Redirects from related topics are different than redirects from related words, because a related topic is more likely to warrant a full and detailed description in the target article. <noinclude>{{This is a redirect/rcat}} </noinclude>{{Redirect template |id=R to related topic |name=To a related topic |to=an article about a similar topic |info=** Redirects from related topics are different than redirects from related words, because a related topic is more likely to warrant a full and detailed description in the target article.
